entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where pulse production growth is analyzed

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: General category of legume crops including chickpea, pigeonpea, mungbean, urdbean, and lentil

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A specific pulse crop that contributed 49.3% of total production in 2020-21

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A specific pulse crop that contributed 16.2% of total production in 2020-21

entities.name: MUNGBEAN
entities.description: A specific pulse crop that showed the highest growth in production at 178%

entities.name: URDBEAN
entities.description: A specific pulse crop that contributed 9.3% of total production in 2020-21

entities.name: LENTIL
entities.description: A specific pulse crop that contributed 4.9% of total production in 2020-21

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total output of crops measured in million MT

entities.name: COMPOUND ANNUAL GROWTH RATE (CAGR)
entities.description: A metric used to measure the annual growth rate of pulse production

relationships.description: India is the location where pulse production is analyzed
